vol_name: Neonatal mimicry of caregiver facial gestures at home
vol_description:
Raw and example blurred video data from the study. Please note that upload of metadata (e.g., task/condition) is currently paused in Databrary.
- Task: webcam-based neonatal mimicry task implemented on Children Helping Science, formerly known as Lookit (MIT)
- Processing applied: None / Participating caregiver face blurred for video coding
- Demographic: Newborn and adult caregiver
- File type: .mp4
